system.specialQuality: harmed only by magical weapons, cold, or forceful blunt attacks
system.moves:
- Manifest a churning wave out of water it touches
- Vanish into/burst out of a body of water
- Engulf a smaller foe (+grabby, see below)
- Surge past foes, dragging them off their feet (+area, +forceful, costs 1d4 HP)
- Move across a porous surface (costs 1d4 HP)

A water matrix absorbs power from currents, tides, waves, and falling water. It gains 1d4 HP from a few days in a flowing stream, a few hours in a rushing river, or a few minutes in rapids or a major waterfall. When you are engulfed by a water vortex, hold 1d4 Breath. When you make a move while engulfed, and that move involves a roll, spend 1 Breath or mark a debility after rolling. If you can’t do either, you drown and are at Death’s Door.
